info.title: XOTEC Data Layer API
info.description: MLS search, geo autocomplete, boundary visualization, and historical trends API.

post.description: Returns only the count of matching properties. Accepts the same request payload as /search but returns a minimal response with just the count.

get.description: Search across states, counties, cities, subdivisions, and postal codes
Search for subdivisions by name with optional filtering. Returns individual subdivisions matching the query.
Search for schools by name with optional filtering by state and school type
Returns countie boundary plus all cities within as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection
Returns countie boundary plus all subdivisions within as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection
Returns city boundary plus all subdivisions within as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection
Returns state boundary plus all counties within as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection

get.summary: List all counties in a state
get.description: Returns a JSON array of all counties within a state. Use for data gathering and SEO page generation.

get.summary: List all cities in a county
get.description: Returns a JSON array of all cities within a county.

get.summary: List all subdivisions in a county
get.description: Returns a JSON array of all subdivisions within a county.

get.summary: List all subdivisions in a city
get.description: Returns a JSON array of all subdivisions within a city.
Returns same-type geographic entities near a given reference entity, with active listing counts.

parameters.name: ref_id
parameters.description: Reference entity ID to search near

parameters.name: radius_miles
parameters.description: Search radius in miles (ignored for subdivisions)

parameters.name: min_listing_count
parameters.description: Exclude entities with fewer active listings than this value

post.summary: Find nearby entities with filtered listing counts
post.description: Same as GET but accepts search filters to compute listing counts matching specific criteria (e.g. only Residential listings with Active status).

200.description: Nearby entities with filtered listing counts

get.summary: Get price history for a listing
Get status history for a listing
Get timeline history for a listing
Get days on market trends by geography
Get price change summary by geography

get.description: Returns a market summary for a specific geography. Includes total active inventory count, new listings in the last 30 days, average days on market, and price statistics across all active listings.

parameters.name: property_type
parameters.description: Filter by property type (e.g., Residential, Commercial)

parameters.name: property_sub_type
parameters.description: Filter by property sub type (e.g., Single Family Residence)

get.description: Returns all MLS lookup values grouped by lookup type. This is a bulk endpoint - prefer /lookups/{lookupName} for specific types.

X-Cache.description: HIT or MISS indicating cache status

get.description: Returns metadata about all available lookup types including value counts and search priority.

200.description: List of lookup types with metadata

X-Cache.description: HIT or MISS indicating cache status

get.summary: Get values for a lookup type
get.description: Returns all values for a specific lookup type (e.g., PropertyType, StandardStatus, Appliances).

parameters.name: lookupName
parameters.description: The lookup type name (e.g., PropertyType, StandardStatus, Appliances)

200.description: Lookup values for the specified type

X-Cache.description: HIT or MISS indicating cache status

get.description: Returns the list of supported crypto assets and fiat currencies.
Returns current crypto prices in the requested fiat currency. Prices are fetched in USD from CoinGecko and converted server-side using cached FX rates.

parameters.name: fiat
parameters.description: Target fiat currency (must be in supported_fiats). Defaults to USD.

error.message: fiat must be one of USD,EUR,GBP,CAD,AUD

503.description: Quotes not ready (no cache, refresh in progress)

get.description: Converts a fiat amount to crypto quantities at current prices.

parameters.name: fiat
parameters.description: Source fiat currency. Defaults to USD.

get.description: Returns cache freshness and last error for crypto quotes and FX rates. Never includes secrets.

special_listing_conditions.description: Filter by special listing conditions (e.g., Short Sale, Bank Owned, Standard)

next_cursor.description: Base64url-encoded JSON cursor for the next page: {"sort_key": <value>, "pk": <value>}.

ref_id.description: ID of the nearby geographic entity

distance_miles.description: Distance from reference entity in miles (null for subdivisions)

listing_count.description: Number of active listings in this entity (filtered if search_filters provided)

min_listing_count.description: Exclude entities with fewer listings than this value

NearbySearchFilters.description: Optional filters to compute listing counts matching specific criteria

CountyChild.description: County data returned by children endpoints

CityChild.description: City data returned by children endpoints

SubdivisionChild.description: Subdivision data returned by children endpoints

property_count.description: Number of properties linked to this school

LookupFieldsListResponse.description: Response containing all available lookup types

lookup_name.description: The lookup type name (e.g., PropertyType, StandardStatus)

value_count.description: Number of values in this lookup type

max_priority.description: Maximum search priority for values in this type (0-10)

last_updated.description: When this lookup type was last updated

LookupValuesResponse.description: Response containing values for a specific lookup type

search_priority.description: Search priority for this lookup type (0-10, higher = more important)

last_updated.description: When this lookup type was last updated

lookup_key.description: Unique key for this lookup value

property_count.description: Number of properties with this value

AllLookupsResponse.description: Response containing all lookups grouped by type

lookups.description: Map of lookup type names to their values

total_count.description: Total number of lookup values across all types

new_listed_count.description: Number of listings added in the last 30 days

avg_days_on_market.description: Average days on market for active listings

as_of_unix.description: Unix timestamp when data was fetched

is_stale.description: True when cache age exceeds TTL

last_success_at_unix.description: Unix timestamp of last successful refresh

last_updated_at_unix.description: Unix timestamp when CoinGecko last updated this price

rate.description: FX conversion rate from USD to requested fiat

as_of_unix.description: Unix timestamp when FX rate was fetched

is_stale.description: True when FX cache age exceeds TTL

last_success_at_unix.description: Unix timestamp of last successful FX refresh

crypto_refresh_interval_seconds.description: How often crypto prices are refreshed (default 600)

crypto_cache_ttl_seconds.description: Crypto cache TTL before marked stale (default 660)

fx_refresh_interval_seconds.description: How often FX rates are refreshed (default 3600)

as_of_unix.description: Unix timestamp when data was fetched

is_stale.description: True when cache age exceeds TTL

price.description: Current price in the requested fiat

crypto_amount.description: Amount of crypto for the given fiat amount

cached_at_unix.description: Unix timestamp when cache was last written

last_success_at_unix.description: Unix timestamp of last successful refresh

is_stale.description: True when cache age exceeds TTL

tags.name: Geo Nearby
tags.description: Find nearby geographic entities with listing counts

tags.name: History
tags.description: Price and status history, market trends

tags.name: Lookups
tags.description: MLS lookup values synchronized from MLS Grid API

tags.name: Crypto
tags.description: Crypto quotes, FX conversion, and service health
